# PERF-217 negative: static computation cached at init
lang: go
file: PERF-217-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func buildICCProfile() []byte {
	return []byte("icc-profile")
}

var iccProfile = buildICCProfile()

func HandleProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = iccProfile
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
